title: New ransomware campaign targeting cloud infrastructure
description: Security researchers have identified a new ransomware variant specifically designed to target cloud-based infrastructure. The campaign uses compromised CI/CD pipelines to deploy malicious code.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity.

title: Show HN: Open-source vulnerability scanner
description: New tool automatically scans dependencies for known vulnerabilities and suggests patches. Gaining traction in the security community.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The open-source vulnerability scanner itself does not pose a direct threat but could be misused by malicious actors to identify unpatched vulnerabilities in systems. This could lead to exploitation if organizations fail to act on the findings promptly.
recommended_actions: Evaluate the tool in a controlled environment to understand its capabilities and limitations before deployment.
Ensure all dependencies in your environment are regularly scanned and patched using trusted tools, including this scanner if deemed reliable.
Monitor for any misuse of the tool by malicious actors and ensure proper access controls are in place to prevent unauthorized scanning.

title: An origin validation vulnerability in the Apex One/SEP agent could allow a local attacker to...
description:
An origin validation vulnerability in the Apex One/SEP agent could allow a local attacker to escalate privileges on affected installations. This is similar to CVE-2026-34927 but exists in a different inter-process communication mechanism.

Please note: an attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34929.

title: An origin validation vulnerability in the Apex One/SEP agent could allow a local attacker to...
description:
An origin validation vulnerability in the Apex One/SEP agent could allow a local attacker to escalate privileges on affected installations.

Please note: an attacker must first obtain the ability to execute low-privileged code on the target system in order to exploit this vulnerability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability could allow local attackers to escalate privileges, potentially gaining unauthorized access to sensitive data or critical system functions. This could lead to system compromise, data breaches, or disruption of services.
recommended_actions: Apply the latest security patches provided by the vendor to mitigate the vulnerability.

Implement endpoint detection and response (EDR) solutions to identify and block privilege escalation attempts.

title: A directory traversal vulnerability in the Apex One (on-premise) server could allow a pre...
description:
A directory traversal vulnerability in the Apex One (on-premise) server could allow a pre-authenticated local attacker to modify a key table on the server to inject malicious code to deploy to agents on affected installations.


This vulnerability is only exploitable on the on-premise version of Apex One and a potential attacker must have access to the Apex One Server and already obtained administrative credentials to the server via some other method to exploit this vulnerability.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-34926.

title: Improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts vulnerability in Turkiye Electricity...
description:
Improper restriction of excessive authentication attempts vulnerability in Turkiye Electricity Transmission Corporation (TEİAŞ) Mobile Application allows Brute Force.

This issue affects Mobile Application: from 1.6.2 before 1.13.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to perform brute force attacks on the authentication mechanism of the TEİAŞ mobile application, potentially leading to unauthorized access to sensitive user accounts and critical infrastructure systems.
recommended_actions: Implement rate-limiting and account lockout mechanisms after a defined number of failed login attempts.
Upgrade the TEİAŞ mobile application to version 1.13 or later to address the vulnerability.
Conduct a security review of authentication mechanisms to identify and mitigate similar vulnerabilities.

title: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus version before 6525, DataSecurity Plus before 6264 and...
description: Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus version before 6525, DataSecurity Plus before 6264 and RecoveryManager Plus before 6313 are vulnerable to Authenticated Remote code execution in the agent machines due to the bug in the 3rd party dependency.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows authenticated remote code execution on agent machines, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data breaches, system compromise, and lateral movement within the network.
recommended_actions: Immediately update Zohocorp ManageEngine ADSelfService Plus to version 6525, DataSecurity Plus to version 6264, and RecoveryManager Plus to version 6313 or later.
Conduct a thorough audit of systems to identify any signs of exploitation and ensure proper logging and monitoring are in place.
Restrict access to vulnerable systems and enforce strong authentication mechanisms to minimize the risk of exploitation.

title:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net/rds: handle zerocopy...
description:
In the Linux kernel, the following vulnerability has been resolved:

net/rds: handle zerocopy send cleanup before the message is queued

A zerocopy send can fail after user pages have been pinned but before
the message is attached to the sending socket.

The purge path currently infers zerocopy state from rm->m_rs, so an
unqueued message can be cleaned up as if it owned normal payload pages.
However, zerocopy ownership is really determined by the presence of
op_mmp_znotifier, regardless of wheth

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability in the Linux kernel's net/rds module could allow unauthorized access or data corruption due to improper handling of zerocopy send cleanup. This may lead to system instability or potential exploitation by attackers.
recommended_actions: Upgrade to the latest Linux kernel version that resolves CVE-2026-43502.
Monitor systems for unusual activity related to the net/rds module and implement additional logging.
Restrict access to systems running vulnerable kernel versions and prioritize patching in critical environments.

title: Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in PosCube Hardware Software and...
description:
Authorization bypass through User-Controlled key vulnerability in PosCube Hardware Software and Consulting Ltd. QR Menu allows Exploitation of Trusted Identifiers.

This issue affects QR Menu: through 21052026. NOTE: The vendor was contacted early about this disclosure but did not respond in any way.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows attackers to bypass authorization mechanisms by exploiting trusted identifiers in the QR Menu system, potentially leading to unauthorized access, data theft, or manipulation of sensitive information.
recommended_actions: Implement strict validation and sanitization of user-controlled keys to prevent exploitation.
Deploy patches or updates to the affected software to address the vulnerability, and ensure regular security audits.
Monitor systems for unusual activity and unauthorized access attempts, and establish incident response protocols.

title: CVE-2026-1184 - GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 11.9 before 18.9.7, 18.10 be
description: GitLab has remediated an issue in GitLab EE affecting all versions from 11.9 before 18.9.7, 18.10 before 18.10.6, and 18.11 before 18.11.3 that could have allowed an unauthenticated user to cause denial of service by uploading a specially crafted file due to improper validation.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: The vulnerability allows an unauthenticated attacker to cause a denial of service (DoS) by uploading a specially crafted file, potentially disrupting GitLab services and impacting development pipelines, CI/CD processes, and project management operations.
recommended_actions: Upgrade GitLab EE to the latest patched versions: 18.9.7, 18.10.6, or 18.11.3, depending on your current version.
Review and monitor access logs for any unusual or unauthorized file uploads to detect potential exploitation attempts.
Implement Web Application Firewalls (WAF) or other security controls to block malicious file uploads until the patch is applied.

title: CVE-2025-15345 - The MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripti
description: The MapGeo – Interactive Geo Maps plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Reflected Cross-Site Scripting via the 'map' parameter in the display-map shortcode in all versions up to, and including, 1.6.27 due to insufficient input sanitization and output escaping. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that execute if they can successfully trick a user into performing an action such as clicking on a link.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-15345.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2025-12669.

title: CVE-2026-7648 - The LearnPress – WordPress LMS Plugin for Create and Sell Online Courses plugin for WordPress is vul
description: The LearnPress – WordPress LMS Plugin for Create and Sell Online Courses plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to payment bypass through user-controlled key in all versions up to, and including, 4.3.5. This is due to improper handling of user-supplied request parameters in the REST API endpoint, which passes the unsanitized parameter array to the add_to_cart() function where array_merge() allows attacker-controlled values to overwrite hardcoded defaults. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with subscriber-level access and above, to enroll in any paid course entirely free of charge by supplying a quantity value of zero, which causes the order total to calculate as $0 and bypasses all payment gateway requirements.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7648.

title: CVE-2026-7525 - The My Calendar – Accessible Event Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypas
description: The My Calendar – Accessible Event Manager plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to authorization bypass in all versions up to, and including, 3.7.9. This is due to the plugin not properly verifying that a user is authorized to perform an action. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with custom-level access and above, to bypass the moderation and approval workflow by tampering with the POST body to publish events or set other unauthorized statuses such as cancelled or private, in ways their role does not permit. While the UI correctly restricts low-privilege users to a draft-only submit button, this restriction is enforced only client-side, making it trivially bypassable by directly manipulating the POST request.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-7525.

title: CVE-2026-5361 - The Envira Gallery Lite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the RE
description: The Envira Gallery Lite plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to Stored Cross-Site Scripting via the REST API in versions up to and including 1.12.4. This is due to insufficient input sanitization in the update_gallery_data() function and improper output escaping in the gallery_init() function. The sanitize_config_values() function only sanitizes the justified_gallery_theme and justified_row_height parameters, but does not sanitize the arrows parameter. When the arrows value is output in the inline JavaScript configuration, it uses esc_attr() which is designed for HTML attribute contexts, not JavaScript contexts, allowing JavaScript expression injection. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Author-level access and above, to inject arbitrary web scripts in pages that will execute whenever a user accesses an injected page.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5361.

title: CVE-2026-5486 - The Unlimited Elements for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'da
description: The Unlimited Elements for Elementor plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to SQL Injection via the 'data[filter_search]' parameter in the get_cat_addons AJAX action in versions up to and including 2.0.7. This is due to insufficient input sanitization and the use of deprecated escaping functions combined with direct string concatenation in SQL query construction. The vulnerability is exacerbated because the normalizeAjaxInputData() function calls stripslashes() on all user input, removing the protection provided by WordPress's wp_magic_quotes() function. Subsequently, the filter_search parameter is escaped using the deprecated wpdb->_escape() function and then directly concatenated into a LIKE clause without using prepared statements. This makes it possible for authenticated attackers, with Contributor-level access and above (who can obtain a valid nonce through the Elementor editor), to inject arbitrary SQL commands and extract sensitive information from the database.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-5486.

title: CVE-2026-46446 - SOGo before 5.12.7, when PostgreSQL or MariaDB is used, and cleartext passwords are stored, allows S
description: SOGo before 5.12.7, when PostgreSQL or MariaDB is used, and cleartext passwords are stored, allows SQL injection. This is related to c_password = '%@' in changePasswordForLogin.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with high severity. CVE: CVE-2026-46446.

title: CVE-2026-44919 - In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in checksum
description: In OpenStack Ironic through 35.x before a3f6d73, during image handling, an infinite loop in checksum calculations can occur via the file:///dev/zero URL.

title: CVE-2026-41281 - Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of Sensi
description: Android App "あんしんフィルター for au" provided by KDDI CORPORATION contains Cleartext Transmission of Sensitive Information (CWE-319) vulnerability. A man-in-the-middle attacker may access and modify communications transmitted in plaintext, potentially resulting in information disclosure or data tampering.

ai_analysis.impact_assessment: Potential security vulnerability with medium severity. CVE: CVE-2026-41281.
